phase_name: Real Asset, Postprocessing, Polish, Pre-Launch QA

completed_tasks.name: CSP allowlist (data:, blob:, wasm-unsafe-eval, worker-src) for fonts + Draco workers + GLB textures
Self-hosted Draco decoder at public/draco/ (gstatic CDN blocked)
Canvas frameloop='demand' first-paint via onCreated invalidate() + FocusController invalidate calls
Reverted Workstation.tsx from real GLB (Plan 04-06) to Phase 2 procedural geometry — GLB scaling couldn't satisfy spec envelope
Iter 10: shrunk monitors to 15" (0.36×0.21) + spaced at x=±0.4 to eliminate overlap; DF=0.34 empirical (spec's 1.8 produces HTML 4× monitor)

remaining_tasks.name: Hacker Simulator-style 3D scene redesign — major scope: 1 ultrawide monitor instead of 3, keyboard + mouse + mug on desk, tower PC beside, neon strip behind monitor, wall poster/sign, chair, cyan/teal ambient accent. Spec deviation: 3-monitor content structure → tabbed/scrollable single-monitor presentation. Reference: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1754840/Hacker_Simulator/ — screenshots saved at /tmp/hs1.jpg /tmp/hs2.jpg /tmp/hs3.jpg (may be deleted on reboot — re-download from steamstatic if needed).

blockers.description: User has 8 external prerequisites for 04-08 ship sign-off (Web3Forms account, OG image screenshot, 2 real devices for QA, peer reviewers). Independent of HS redesign.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide scope of HS redesign: 1 ultrawide monitor (spec deviation) vs 2 monitors vs keep 3 with HS decor only
human_actions_pending.context: Plan 02 D-04 / Plan 03 D-01 lock 3 monitors mapped to 3 content sections (left=projects, center=identity, right=writeups). Reducing to 1 requires content restructure.

decisions.decision: Tagged iter10-3-monitors-baseline before HS redesign for safe rollback
decisions.rationale: User explicitly asked to save current state in case redesign fails
Context at 65% in current session; many iterations made; fresh session needed for major rework

decisions.decision: drei <Html transform distanceFactor> empirical formula: world_size ≈ CSS_px × DF / 400
decisions.rationale: Spec range 1.5–2.5 is THEORETICAL and was never deploy-verified; empirically DF=1.8 with 600px CSS produces 2.7m HTML overlay vs 0.55m monitor screen (~5× overflow). Inverse of original mental model.

decisions.decision: Phase 2 procedural geometry > Plan 04-06 real GLB
decisions.rationale: Real Poly Haven GLB at any uniform scale fails to satisfy spec envelope (1.2m × 0.79m, ratio 1.52 vs GLB 2.0×0.79=2.53). Plan 04-06 Path A is fragile; procedural is coherent.

next_action: Start fresh session via /gsd-resume-work. The resume workflow will detect this HANDOFF.json + .continue-here.md. Then: (1) confirm with user whether HS redesign should retain 3 monitors with decor (low-risk) OR go to 1 ultrawide (spec deviation, content restructure). (2) Re-fetch HS screenshots if /tmp was cleared. (3) Implement in clean context with iterative screenshot loop (vite preview + Playwright at 2552×1364) per the proven pattern.
context_notes: Long session — went through ~12 iterations of 3D scene tuning. User feedback was directional but visual judgement gradually converged. Hard-won learnings: (1) CSP must allow data:/blob:/wasm-unsafe-eval/worker-src blob: for R3F+drei+useGLTF. (2) Canvas frameloop='demand' in R3F v9+React 19 doesn't auto-paint on first commit — explicit invalidate() needed in onCreated. (3) drei distanceFactor formula is inverse of intuition. (4) Real GLB swaps need scale-and-offset both — uniform scale alone won't reach target Y. (5) Empirical screenshot loops via Playwright at user resolution (2552×1364) are 10× faster than text iteration.
